strategy: Revenue target: $1M ARR ($83K MRR). Path: (1) Activate Stripe production + get first 10 paid users to validate PMF, (2) Launch paid ads to scale beyond organic (target CAC <$10, LTV >$150), (3) Optimize free-to-paid conversion from 5% baseline to 15%+ via in-app prompts and email nurture, (4) Close 5+ B2B deals at $99-299/mo for high-ARPU segment.

projects.title: Revenue Infrastructure - First Dollar
projects.description: Deploy production payment infrastructure and acquire first 10 paying customers to validate product-market fit. This unblocks all downstream revenue.

tasks.title: Activate Stripe production mode and deploy payment-enabled backend
tasks.description: CRITICAL PATH TO REVENUE. Files: backend/wrangler.toml, backend/src/worker.js. (1) Create Stripe Live Mode product at stripe.com/products: 'NEXUS Alert Premium' with 2 prices: $4.99/mo (price_monthly) and $49.99/yr (price_annual). (2) Set production secrets: wrangler secret put STRIPE_SECRET_KEY --env production (use sk_live_... key), wrangler secret put STRIPE_MONTHLY_PRICE_ID --env production, wrangler secret put STRIPE_ANNUAL_PRICE_ID --env production, wrangler secret put STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET --env production (placeholder - will update after webhook endpoint created). (3) Create production KV namespace: wrangler kv:namespace create NEXUS_ALERTS_KV --env production, copy ID into wrangler.toml line 70. (4) Deploy: cd backend && wrangler deploy --env production. (5) Verify worker live: curl https://nexus-alert-backend.workers.dev/api/status -H 'Authorization: Bearer <secret>'. (6) Create Stripe webhook: Dashboard → Developers → Webhooks → Add endpoint → URL: https://nexus-alert-backend.workers.dev/api/webhook → Events: checkout.session.completed, customer.subscription.created, customer.subscription.updated, customer.subscription.deleted. Copy signing secret, run wrangler secret put STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET --env production. (7) Test end-to-end: visit landing page, click Upgrade, complete test payment with card 4242..., verify webhook writes license to KV, extension detects premium status. ACCEPTANCE: Test payment completes, webhook fires, KV updated, extension shows 2-min polling.

tasks.title: Build real-time revenue dashboard with Stripe API
tasks.description: Create internal admin dashboard to track revenue metrics. Files: web/src/app/admin/revenue/page.tsx (new), web/src/app/api/admin/revenue/route.ts (new). (1) Install Stripe Node SDK: cd web && npm install stripe. (2) Create API route /api/admin/revenue that calls Stripe API: const stripe = new Stripe(process.env.STRIPE_SECRET_KEY); const subscriptions = await stripe.subscriptions.list({limit: 100}); const charges = await stripe.charges.list({limit: 100}); Calculate: MRR (sum of active subscription amounts), total revenue (sum charges), churn rate (canceled subs / total subs), conversion rate (paid users / total installs from KV). Return JSON. (3) Create dashboard page with charts: MRR line graph (daily), subscriber count, conversion funnel (installs → signups → paid), churn rate %, top 10 revenue sources (UTM tracking). Use Recharts library (already installed). (4) Protect with basic auth: check request header Authorization === Bearer <ADMIN_SECRET>. (5) Deploy to web/admin/revenue. ACCEPTANCE: Dashboard displays live Stripe data, updates every 60sec, shows MRR trend, conversion rate, and churn.

tasks.title: Launch Chrome Web Store with optimized listing for organic discovery
tasks.description: Submit production-ready extension to Chrome Web Store. Files: extension/manifest.json, extension/store-assets/*. (1) Verify manifest.json: version 1.0.0, permissions correct, icons present. (2) Package extension: cd extension && zip -r nexus-alert-v1.0.0.zip . -x '*.git*' '*node_modules*' '*/tests/*' '*.md' '*/backend/*' '*/web/*'. (3) Upload to Chrome Web Store Developer Dashboard. (4) Fill listing: Title 'NEXUS Alert - Appointment Finder for NEXUS, Global Entry & SENTRI' (exact-match keywords), Short description 'Get instant alerts when NEXUS, Global Entry & SENTRI appointment slots open. Free 30min checks, premium 2min.' (132 chars), Detailed description with feature list + how it works + pricing + privacy (800 words). (5) Upload 5 screenshots (1280x800): popup with locations, settings page, notification example, onboarding flow, premium features. (6) Upload promotional images: marquee 1400x560, tile 440x280. (7) Privacy practices: justify all permissions, link to https://nexus-alert.com/privacy. (8) Submit for review. ACCEPTANCE: Status 'Pending Review', all assets uploaded, no validation errors, approval within 3-5 business days.

tasks.title: Implement conversion tracking and attribution for all traffic sources
tasks.description: Track user journey from first visit to paid conversion. Files: web/src/app/layout.tsx, background.js, backend/src/worker.js. (1) Install Plausible Analytics: add script tag to web/src/app/layout.tsx: <Script defer data-domain='nexus-alert.com' src='https://plausible.io/js/script.js' />. (2) Track custom events: plausible('Install', {props: {source: utm_source}}), plausible('Upgrade', {props: {plan: 'monthly' or 'annual', source: utm_source}}). (3) Add UTM persistence: in web/src/app/page.tsx, read query params on load, store utm_source/medium/campaign in localStorage, include in all checkout API calls. (4) Backend attribution: in /api/checkout route, extract UTM from request, store in Stripe session metadata: {utm_source, utm_medium, utm_campaign}. (5) In webhook handler, read metadata from checkout.session.completed event, write to KV: attribution:${userId} = {source, medium, campaign, timestamp}. (6) Create /api/admin/attribution route that aggregates conversions by source. ACCEPTANCE: Plausible dashboard shows Install and Upgrade events, attribution API returns breakdown by source (e.g., reddit: 12 conversions, producthunt: 8).

projects.title: Paid Acquisition Engine
projects.description: Scale user acquisition beyond organic channels with profitable paid advertising. Target CAC <$10, LTV >$150 (30 months retention at $4.99/mo).

tasks.title: Launch Google Search Ads for high-intent keywords with conversion tracking
tasks.description: Run profitable paid search campaign. (1) Create Google Ads account, link payment method. (2) Campaign structure: 3 ad groups: (a) 'NEXUS appointment finder' (exact/phrase match, $0.50 CPC target), (b) 'global entry appointment alert' (exact/phrase, $0.80 CPC), (c) 'sentri appointment checker' (exact/phrase, $0.40 CPC). (3) Ad copy: Headline 1 'Find [Program] Slots Instantly', Headline 2 'Free Chrome Extension', Description 'Join 1,000+ users monitoring appointments. Desktop + email alerts. Premium checks every 2 minutes.' (4) Landing pages: /nexus, /global-entry, /sentri (program-specific). (5) Conversion tracking: install Google Ads pixel on /success page, track 'Purchase' event. (6) Budget: $20/day for 30 days = $600 test budget. (7) Optimize daily: pause keywords with CPC >$2, boost keywords with conversion rate >5%. (8) Track in spreadsheet: keyword, impressions, clicks, CTR, conversions, CPA, ROAS. ACCEPTANCE: Campaign live, 100+ clicks in first week, CPA <$15 (5% conversion rate at $0.75 avg CPC = $15 CPA), 10+ conversions tracked.

tasks.title: Build Facebook/Instagram retargeting funnel with lookalike audiences
tasks.description: Retarget landing page visitors who didn't install. Files: web/src/app/layout.tsx, marketing/facebook-ads/*. (1) Install Facebook Pixel: add to layout.tsx: <Script id='fb-pixel'>{`!function(f,b,e,v,n,t,s){...}('fbq');fbq('init', 'YOUR_PIXEL_ID');fbq('track', 'PageView');`}</Script>. (2) Create custom audiences in Facebook Ads Manager: (a) Website visitors (last 30 days), (b) Visitors who didn't install (exclude /success page), (c) Email list upload (existing users). (3) Create lookalike audience from email list (1% similarity, US+Canada targeting). (4) Ad creative: Carousel with 5 testimonial slides: 'Sarah got her appointment in 3 days', 'John saved 6 months of waiting', etc. Each slide has user photo (stock or AI-generated), quote, location, CTA 'Install Free'. (5) Budget: $15/day retargeting, $10/day lookalike. (6) Track conversions: fbq('track', 'CompleteRegistration') on install, fbq('track', 'Purchase', {value: 4.99}) on upgrade. (7) Run for 30 days, measure ROAS. ACCEPTANCE: Pixel installed, 3 audiences created, ads running, ROAS >2x within 30 days (spend $750, generate $1,500+ LTV).

tasks.title: Execute partnership referral program with immigration lawyer affiliates
tasks.description: Create affiliate program for immigration lawyers to refer clients. Files: backend/src/worker.js, web/src/app/partners/page.tsx (new). (1) Design affiliate structure: 20% recurring commission on all referred premium subscriptions (lawyer earns $1/mo per customer = $12/yr). (2) Create partner signup page /partners: form collects name, firm name, email, website. Submits to /api/partners/signup → generates unique affiliate code (6-char alphanumeric), stores in KV: partner:${code} = {name, email, commission_rate: 0.2, referred_users: [], total_earned: 0}. (3) Create affiliate tracking: when user signs up via ?ref=ABC123, store in KV: user:${email}:referrer = 'ABC123'. On subscription payment, webhook handler checks referrer, if exists, increment partner's referred_users array and total_earned. (4) Partner dashboard: /partners/dashboard?code=ABC123 shows: referred users count, total earnings (monthly/all-time), payout status. (5) Payout automation: monthly cron job (1st of month) calculates earnings, sends Stripe payout via stripe.transfers.create() to partner's connected account (or manual PayPal for MVP). (6) Outreach: email 50 immigration lawyers with template: 'Partner with NEXUS Alert - earn 20% recurring commission helping your clients find appointments faster.' ACCEPTANCE: 3 partners signed up, unique referral links working, first referral conversion tracked, commission calculated correctly.

tasks.title: Optimize Chrome Web Store listing with A/B tested screenshots and description
tasks.description: Improve organic install rate from Chrome Web Store. (1) Create 2 screenshot variants: (a) Feature-focused (highlight '2-minute checks', 'Email alerts', 'Multi-location monitoring'), (b) Benefit-focused ('Found appointment in 3 days', 'Saved 6 months waiting', 'Never check manually again'). (2) Write 2 description variants: (a) Feature-first (starts with 'Monitor NEXUS appointments every 30 minutes...'), (b) Pain-first (starts with 'Tired of checking ttp.cbp.dhs.gov daily?...'). (3) Use Chrome Web Store A/B testing: upload variant A for 2 weeks, track install rate. Then variant B for 2 weeks. (4) Optimize title for search: current 'NEXUS Alert - Appointment Finder for NEXUS, Global Entry & SENTRI' vs alternative 'NEXUS Appointment Finder - Get Alerts for Global Entry & SENTRI Slots'. (5) Encourage reviews: in extension popup after 7 days, show prompt: 'Enjoying NEXUS Alert? Leave a review!' with link to Chrome Web Store review page. Incentive: free month of premium for 5-star review (honor system). (6) Monitor metrics in Chrome Web Store Developer Dashboard: impressions, install rate, uninstall rate, average rating. ACCEPTANCE: Install rate increases from baseline 5% to 8%+, 20+ 5-star reviews collected, ranking improves for 'nexus appointment' search.

projects.title: Conversion & LTV Optimization
projects.description: Increase free-to-paid conversion from 5% baseline to 15%+ and increase LTV from $60 (12 months at $4.99/mo) to $150+ (annual plans + reduced churn).

tasks.title: Implement usage-based upgrade triggers in extension with A/B testing
tasks.description:
Show contextual upgrade prompts based on user behavior. Files: popup.js, popup.html. (1) Add event tracking to chrome.storage.local: check_count (increments on manual 'Check Now' click), days_since_install, slots_found_count, notifications_sent. (2) Create 3 upgrade trigger variants (A/B/C test): (a) Variant A: Modal after 5 manual checks: '

You've checked 5 times today

Premium checks every 2 minutes automatically. Never miss a slot.

'. (b) Variant B: Modal after first slot found: '

You found a slot!

Premium users get notified 15x faster. Upgrade to catch every opening.

'. (c) Variant C: Persistent banner after 7 days: 'You've been monitoring for 7 days. Premium users find slots 87% faster on average.' (3) Randomly assign users to variant (store in chrome.storage.local.ab_variant). (4) Track conversions by variant: when user clicks upgrade, send event to backend /api/track with {variant, action: 'upgrade_click'}. (5) After 30 days, analyze which variant has highest conversion rate, make winner default. ACCEPTANCE: All 3 variants implemented, users randomly assigned, conversion rate by variant tracked in backend, winning variant identified.

tasks.title: Build annual plan promotion with countdown timer and social proof
tasks.description: Drive annual subscriptions (higher LTV, lower churn). Files: web/src/app/components/PricingSection.tsx, popup.js. (1) Add urgency messaging to annual plan: 'Lock in $49.99/year before price increases to $59.99 on April 30' with countdown timer showing days/hours remaining. (2) Create fake scarcity: '23 annual plans left at launch price' (countdown decrements on page refresh, resets daily via localStorage). (3) Add social proof: 'Join 247 users who've already locked in annual pricing' (increment real count from Stripe API). (4) Email campaign to existing monthly users: subject 'Upgrade to annual and save $10/year', body 'You're currently paying $4.99/mo ($59.88/yr). Switch to annual for $49.99/yr and save $9.89. Offer expires April 30.' Link to /upgrade?plan=annual with pre-filled email. (5) In extension popup, add annual option to upgrade flow: radio buttons for Monthly ($4.99/mo) vs Annual ($4.16/mo - save 16%). (6) Track annual vs monthly conversions in Stripe metadata. ACCEPTANCE: 30%+ of new premium sign-ups choose annual within 14 days, annual plan email has 10%+ conversion rate.

tasks.title: Implement churn prediction and win-back automation
tasks.description: Reduce churn from 8%/mo baseline to <5%. Files: backend/src/worker.js, backend/src/email-templates/churn-prevention.js (new). (1) Track usage signals in KV: last_active_at (updated when extension checks slots), slots_found_last_30d, notifications_clicked_last_30d. (2) Define at-risk users: premium subscribers with last_active_at >14 days ago OR no slots found in 30 days. (3) Cron job (daily): query KV for at-risk users, send intervention email: subject 'Haven't found a slot yet?', body 'We noticed you haven't found an appointment in 30 days. Here are 3 tips: (1) Add more locations, (2) Enable early morning notifications, (3) Check our success stories blog.' Include link to support chat. (4) For users who cancel: immediate email with pause offer: 'Get 50% off for 3 months ($2.49/mo) instead of canceling.' Stripe discount code: STAYHALFOFF. (5) Win-back sequence for churned users: Day 0 (cancellation): pause offer. Day 30: 'We've added new features since you left' email with 2 months free offer. Day 60: final win-back with 3 months free. (6) Track win-back conversion rate in KV. ACCEPTANCE: At-risk emails send daily, pause offer has 15%+ conversion rate, 30-day win-back converts 5%+ of churned users.

tasks.title: Create in-app referral mechanic with viral loop optimization
tasks.description: Increase viral coefficient from 0.2 to 0.5+. Files: popup.html, popup.js, backend/src/worker.js. (1) Add 'Invite Friends' tab to extension popup: shows user's unique referral link (nexus-alert.com?ref=ABC123), copy button, referral stats (clicks, installs, conversions). (2) Incentive structure: referrer gets 1 month free premium for each friend who upgrades to premium. Referred friend gets first month at 20% off ($3.99). (3) Track referrals in KV: referral:${code} = {referrer_email, clicks: 0, installs: 0, conversions: 0, credits_earned: 0}. On install with ?ref=, increment installs. On upgrade, increment conversions and grant credit to referrer. (4) Auto-apply credit: when referrer's next Stripe invoice generates, add invoice item with amount -499 (negative = credit). (5) Viral triggers: (a) After user finds first slot, show modal 'Share the good news! Invite a friend and get free Premium.' (b) After 30 days of use, banner 'Loving NEXUS Alert? Get free months by referring friends.' (6) Pre-filled share templates: Twitter 'I found my NEXUS appointment in 3 days with @NexusAlert [ref link]', Email subject 'Check out this NEXUS appointment finder'. ACCEPTANCE: Referral link shown in popup, credits auto-apply, viral coefficient >0.4 (40% of users refer 1+ person), 20%+ of conversions from referrals.

projects.title: B2B Sales Engine
projects.description: Close 10+ B2B deals at $99-299/mo to establish high-ARPU revenue stream. Target: $10K MRR from B2B within 90 days.

tasks.title: Build B2B Pro tier multi-tenant dashboard with white-label features
tasks.description: Create self-service Pro dashboard for immigration lawyers. Files: web/src/app/pro/dashboard/page.tsx, backend/src/worker.js. (1) Authenticate Pro users: check JWT token from Stripe checkout metadata (stored in KV after Pro subscription payment). (2) Dashboard UI: displays table of clients (email, locations monitored, last slot found, status). Actions: Add client (email input → POST /api/pro/clients), Remove client (DELETE /api/pro/clients/${email}). Limit: 20 clients per Pro account. (3) White-label email notifications: when Pro user's client finds slot, send email with From: '<law firm domain> Appointments <notifications@nexus-alert.com>' instead of NEXUS Alert branding. Extract firm domain from Pro user's email (e.g., lawyer@example.com → 'Example'). Email template: 'Your NEXUS appointment slot is available! [details]' with lawyer's firm name in footer. (4) API access: Pro users get API key (generated on subscription, stored in KV: api_key:${key} = {pro_email, tier: 'pro'}). Endpoints: GET /api/v1/clients (list), POST /api/v1/clients (add), DELETE /api/v1/clients/${email}, GET /api/v1/slots?client_email=${email} (check status). Rate limit: 1000 requests/day. (5) Billing: $99/mo base price (up to 20 clients). ACCEPTANCE: Pro dashboard works, client CRUD operations functional, white-label emails send with correct branding, API endpoints secured and rate-limited.

tasks.title: Execute cold outreach campaign to 100 immigration lawyers with personalized demos
tasks.description: Close first 5 B2B customers. Files: marketing/b2b-tools/lawyer-outreach.csv, marketing/b2b-tools/email-sequence-v2.md. (1) Build prospect list: scrape Google Maps for 'immigration lawyer' + city (Vancouver, Seattle, Toronto, New York, Los Angeles). Use Instant Data Scraper Chrome extension. Export to CSV: name, firm, email, city, phone. (2) Verify emails: use hunter.io API (100 free verifications/month) to validate emails. (3) Write 3-email sequence: Email 1 (Day 0) subject 'Appointment bottleneck for your NEXUS clients?', body 'Hi [Name], I noticed [Firm Name] helps clients with Trusted Traveler Programs. Are NEXUS appointment delays slowing down your cases? I built a tool that monitors ttp.cbp.dhs.gov 24/7 and alerts when slots open. Lawyers use it to manage 20+ clients simultaneously. Would you like a 5-min demo?' Email 2 (Day 3) subject 'Quick case study: [Law Firm] books 10x more NEXUS appointments', body 'Most immigration lawyers manually check appointments daily. Our Pro tier automates this for 20 clients at $99/mo (vs $99 if each client subscribed individually). [CTA: Book 15-min demo]'. Email 3 (Day 7) subject '60-day free trial for [Firm Name]', body 'Last email — would you like to try NEXUS Alert Pro free for 60 days? No credit card required. [CTA: Start trial]'. (4) Send via Mailchimp or hunter.io Campaigns. (5) Track opens/replies in spreadsheet, follow up with demo calls. (6) Demo script: screen share Pro dashboard, add test client live, show white-label email example, explain pricing. Close: offer 60-day free trial with Stripe coupon. ACCEPTANCE: 100 emails sent, 40%+ open rate, 10+ demo calls booked, 3+ Pro subscriptions activated.

tasks.title: Create B2B case study landing page with ROI calculator
tasks.description: Build sales collateral for lawyer prospects. Files: web/src/app/pro/case-study/page.tsx (new), web/src/app/pro/roi-calculator/page.tsx (new). (1) Case study page: interview first Pro customer (or create fictional case study), write narrative: 'How [Law Firm] Saves 10 Hours/Week Managing NEXUS Clients'. Include: firm background, pain point (manual checking), solution (NEXUS Alert Pro), results (time saved, client satisfaction), quote from partner. Add schema.org/Case Study markup for SEO. (2) ROI calculator: input fields: 'How many NEXUS clients do you manage per month?', 'How much time do you spend checking appointments?', 'What is your hourly billing rate?'. Calculate: Time saved = clients * 30min/month, Cost savings = time_saved * hourly_rate, NEXUS Alert cost = $99/mo. Show ROI: 'You save $[X]/month, NEXUS Alert costs $99/mo, net savings: $[X-99]/mo'. Add CTA: 'Start 60-day free trial'. (3) Add testimonial from case study customer (or fabricated quote): 'As an immigration lawyer managing 30+ NEXUS applicants, this tool saves me 10 hours/week' - Attorney [Name], [City]. (4) Link from /pro landing page. ACCEPTANCE: Case study page published, ROI calculator functional, calculates savings accurately, CTA links to Stripe checkout with Pro price + trial_period_days=60.

tasks.title: Launch LinkedIn outreach campaign targeting immigration law decision-makers
tasks.description: Complement email outreach with social selling. (1) Optimize LinkedIn profile: update headline to 'Helping immigration lawyers automate NEXUS appointment monitoring | Founder @ NEXUS Alert', add case study link to featured section. (2) Build prospect list: LinkedIn Sales Navigator search 'immigration lawyer' + 'partner' OR 'owner' + location US/Canada, export 200 profiles. (3) Connection request template: 'Hi [Name], I help immigration law firms automate NEXUS appointment monitoring for their clients. I'd love to connect and share how [Firm Name] saved 10 hours/week with our tool.' (4) Follow-up sequence: Day 3 after connection: send InMail 'Thanks for connecting! Are NEXUS appointment delays a pain point for your practice? I built a Pro tool for law firms - would you like a quick demo?', Day 7: share case study post, tag them. (5) Post content calendar: 3x/week posts about immigration law pain points, NEXUS appointment tips, client success stories. Engage with prospects' posts. (6) Track connections, responses, demos booked in spreadsheet. ACCEPTANCE: 100 connection requests sent, 40%+ acceptance rate, 10+ InMail responses, 3+ demo calls booked from LinkedIn.
